description: A wardrobe essential, a belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. lee have perfected this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes by combining classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with cargo trousers, casual boots and a comfy, casual tee. Length at largest setting: 90 cmPouch dimensions: 9 cm x 13 cmMade of woven textileDouble tang clasp for a snug FitHoles to customise fit and for stylePouch with press stud fastening attached to belt to store your small essentials while you're on the goCareWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
